---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem or limitation does this feature address? Be specific.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as detailed as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.

## Scope / Component

Which part(s) of the system does this affect?

- [ ] ESP32 Sensor Node firmware
- [ ] ESP32 Actuator Node firmware
- [ ] Flask backend / API
- [ ] Machine learning pipeline (training)
- [ ] ML inference (server-side)
- [ ] Dashboard (frontend)
- [ ] Government coordination module
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Additional Context

Links to papers, hardware datasheets, or other references that support this request.
